nasb.text: The king of Israel sent to the place about which the man of God had told him; thus he warned him, so that he guarded himself there, more than once or twice.

esv.text: And the king of Israel sent to the place about which the man of God told him. Thus he used to warn him, so that he saved himself there more than once or twice.

cnv.text: 以色列王派人到那地方，就是神人曾告訴他，警告他的，他就在那裡小心防範；這樣不止一兩次。

ccb.text: 以色列王派人到上帝的仆人所说的地方，警告那里的人要小心防备。这样的事情发生了好几次。
